rationale: Educ. Code §8.001 governs establishment andoperation of regional education service centers. It contains no provisions regarding homestead exemptions, property tax appraisal, or school funding formulas that would conflict with the proposed Tax Code change.
quote: The commissioner shall provide for the establishment and operation of not more than 20 regional education service centers.
_note: No conflict. This statute addresses regional education service centers and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal.
